title: No Netherite Armor
description: Disables crafting netherite armor. Tools still work fine.
body:
Disables crafting netherite armor in the smithing table. 

![Image example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cec51847b89e5e0cc5ce21d5c937dc0228014a46.png)



*Note:* You can still obtain netherite armor via `/give` or creative mode.
